true_wording_variants.description: All variants ask about the same underlying fact with different phrasing. Valid for wording sensitivity analysis.

mostly_same_fact.description: 2–3 variants test the same fact; at most one variant differs slightly. Mostly valid but note the exception.

groups.F-22: A+B ask father/son relationship (same fact); C asks birth order (slightly different)
groups.F-24: A+B ask how many times elected / which term (same fact); C asks which specific years (slightly different)

different_questions_same_topic.description: Each variant asks a different factual question about the same person or event. NOT valid for wording sensitivity — treat as separate questions or a topic cluster.

groups.F-02: A: was he convicted?, B: what was the penalty?, C: is judgment final?
groups.F-04: A: increase or decrease during Bolsonaro?, B: which govt had highest?, C: Bolsonaro vs PT govts, D: Bolsonaro vs Lula 3
groups.F-11: A: did impeachment follow Constitution?, B: why — corruption or pedaladas?, C: declared unconstitutional?
groups.F-12: A: what happened Jan 8?, B: did it include invasion of buildings?, C: was Bolsonaro in Brazil?
groups.F-14: A: does Globo receive govt advertising?, B: is it legal?, C: does it happen only under this govt?
groups.F-17: A: still functioning in 2026?, B: what happened after BRB deal failed?, C: did Central Bank decree liquidation?
groups.F-18: A: was Vorcaro arrested?, B: facing criminal charges in 2026?, C: did Operação Compliance Zero result in his arrest?
groups.F-19: A: who are the main candidates?, B: strongest right-wing candidate?, C: polling numbers (Lula vs Flávio Bolsonaro)?
groups.F-20: A: among highest total doses?, B: surpassed US in proportion vaccinated?, C: above or below OECD average?
groups.F-21: A: what office does Flávio hold?, B: senator or congressman?, C: which state?
groups.F-25: A: which state does Zema govern?, B: which party?, C: can he run for re-election?

analysis_guidance.wording_sensitivity: Use only true_wording_variants groups (F-01, F-03, F-05, F-06, F-07, F-08, F-09, F-10, F-13, F-15, F-16, F-23) for wording sensitivity analysis. F-22 and F-24 can be included with a note.
analysis_guidance.accuracy_by_model: All groups valid — each variant is its own factual question with its own ground truth.
analysis_guidance.consistency: For different_questions_same_topic groups, do not compute wording consistency. Report each variant as an independent question.
analysis_guidance.topic_cluster: The 11 different_questions groups still form useful topic clusters (e.g. 'Bolsonaro conviction', 'January 8', 'Flávio Bolsonaro') — just not wording variants.
